results.title: Mohammad A.
highlights:
AI / ML at Walgreens
...
Director, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science at [Walgreens Boots Alliance](https://www.linkedin.com/company/walgreens-boots-alliance)
...
#### Director, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science (Current)
...
Leading the AI Transformation team at Walgreens CTO. Most recently, I have had the honor of leading an amazing team of AI scientists and engineers to build an in-house AI assistant to serve Walgreens team members. Our 6 month journey started with building a proof of concept and expanding it to a series of enterprise-scale data pipelines for continuous ingestion of unstructured content from proprietary web sites, documents and knowledge bases for the purpose of retrieval augmented generation. Our data ingestion cronjobs consist of web scrapers, document parsers and algorithms for semantic chunking and encoding of unstructured text that were built and customized to maximize content retrieval performance based on many rounds of user acceptance testing thanks to our close partnership with the product teams across the company. We didn't stop there! To ensure relevancy and factualness of AI responses, our multi-stage content ranking algorithms are augmented with innovative post-generation response validation and re-ranking of source content before they are presented to the team members. From a production standpoint, our focus has been on implementing a low latency and scalable backend API for integration with several frontend applications including internal websites and messaging platforms for thousands of store and corporate team members. Alongside our CI/CD pipelines, we have built end-to-end automated functional and non-functional testing suites to ensured nonstop performance. To close the loop, we have built and continue to develop our real-time insights dashboard to analyze team member feedback and sentiment which allows for continuous enhancement of the end-to-end user experience.
...
#### Principal Algorithms & Machine Learning Scientist
...
Leading a wide range of data science projects from inception to production. Predictive modeling of Rx abandonment to minimize return-to-stock at the Walgreens pharmacies. Serve model through a REST API and large scale production on Azure Kubernetes. Forecast ready for pickup times at Walgreens pharmacies and serve as a REST API for customer-facing mobile and web applications. Customer can view estimated times in real-time when selecting a store for pickup. Improve patient outreach for medication adherence. Build and maintain data pipelines and models for computing and forecasting proportion-of-days-covered for Walgreens chronic patients. Production through a weekly batch process in Azure Databricks. Improve WBA specialty Rx routing by building a cost model and forecasting the revenue for each channel. Initial proof of concept delivered in a PowerBI dashboard to the internal business users and further integration to the Walgreens Rx routing system under way. Build a virtual assistant bot (chatbot/IVR) for Walgreens customers from the ground up using the latest advancements in the area of generative AI and large language models.
...

I am a senior leader in the organization responsible for developing the overall AI strategy and vision and overseeing the implementation of those strategies. Ability to effectively integrate technology with business needs and drive the adoption and innovation of AI technologies company-wide. Excellent strategic insights are required to be able to accurately assess the value of AI applications in the business and develop appropriate landing solutions. Requires close attention to the latest trends and cutting-edge technologies in the industry in order to develop strategic plans to drive the company's growth in AI. In addition to strategy development, it is necessary to lead the cultivation and development of the talent team to ensure that the company has a highly skilled AI team that is capable of innovation. There is a need to work closely with technical and business teams to drive the development and deployment of AI solutions to achieve business objectives. Additionally, will be required to strategically collaborate on behalf of the company with external partners, academia, and regulators to facilitate the development of industry standards and the exchange of technological innovations. results.title: Shravya K
highlights:
Senior Data Engineer at [Walgreens](https://www.linkedin.com/company/walgreens)
...
I am a results-driven Senior Big Data Engineer architecting, designing, and implementing large-scale data platforms across healthcare, finance, telecom, retail, and CPG industries. Expertise in AI Foundry platform implementation, including Convert Data accelerators, data archival strategy design, and metadata enrichment for intelligent data lifecycle management. My core expertise lies in building scalable and secure data pipelines using tools from the Hadoop ecosystem (HDFS, Hive, Spark, Kafka, Sqoop, Pig, Flume, Oozie), combined with advanced cloud engineering skills across AWS, Azure, and GCP. I’ve led end-to-end data integration projects, including legacy system migrations, streaming data solutions, and cloud-native data lakes and warehouses. I’ve worked extensively with ETL tools like Informatica, Talend, ADF, Glue, and NiFi, and developed robust batch/streaming pipelines using PySpark, Spark SQL, and Scala. My experience includes building HIPAA-compliant clinical data platforms, fraud detection engines, telecom provisioning systems, and financial forecasting pipelines. In the cloud space, I’ve deployed solutions using Azure Synapse, Snowflake, AWS Redshift, GCP BigQuery, and real-time systems like Apache Kafka and Flink. I’ve implemented CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, and orchestrated complex workflows using Apache Airflow. My background also includes data governance (metadata, lineage, security), healthcare data standards (HL7, FHIR, OMOP), and BI/reporting using Tableau, Power BI, and Looker. With a strong foundation in SQL, Python, Scala, and Java, I excel in transforming raw data into valuable insights that drive business decisions. Currently, I’m seeking new opportunities to design modern, cloud-first data architectures that push the boundaries of analytics, automation, and AI-driven innovation. results.title: Varkala N.
highlights:
Azure Data Engineer at [Walgreens](https://www.linkedin.com/company/walgreens)
...
Azure Data Engineer with over 5 years of experience building and managing scalable data platforms on Microsoft Azure and Microsoft Fabric. I specialize in creating end-to-end data pipelines, developing ETL workflows, and designing data lakehouse and data warehousing solutions that support analytics and business intelligence. I have strong hands-on experience with Azure Data Factory, Databricks, Synapse Analytics, and Azure Data Lake. My technical background includes working with PySpark, SQL, Python, and Apache Spark to process large datasets and improve performance of data workflows. In my current role at Walgreens, I’m focused on modernizing enterprise analytics by helping migrate traditional data warehouse solutions to Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse architecture. This helps teams work with data more efficiently in a scalable and secure environment. I enjoy building reliable data pipelines, improving data processes, and helping organizations make better decisions through data.
...
### Azure Data Engineer at [Walgreens](https://www.linkedin.com/company/walgreens) (Current)
...
At Walgreens, I lead the migration of Azure Synapse and Azure Data Lake platforms to Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse and Warehouse to build a unified analytics environment. I design and maintain Fabric Lakehouse architecture supporting batch and near real-time analytics for operational and compliance reporting. I build and optimize Azure Data Factory pipelines and Fabric Dataflows to ingest and transform data from multiple sources while maintaining strong data quality standards. I develop scalable data transformations using Apache Spark and PySpark, implement Delta Lake optimization techniques, and tune Spark workloads to improve performance. I create Power BI semantic models, dashboards, and reports with row-level security to ensure secure data access. I also implement Python-based data validation processes, automate CI/CD deployments using Azure DevOps, and enforce HIPAA-aligned data governance and security practices while collaborating with business stakeholders to deliver reliable analytics solutions.

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s Degree (preferably in information technology, engineering, math, computer science, analytics, engineering or other related field)
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of
...
is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare

Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.

highlights:
**Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Walgreens Data Entry Jobs at arenaflex** | Wfhforgeon
...
# **Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Walgreens Data Entry Jobs at arenaflex**
...
Join arenaflex, a leading healthcare and retail company, as a Full Stack Data Scientist in our Walgreens Data Entry Jobs team. As a key member of our team, you will utilize your expertise in data science, predictive analytics, and machine learning to drive business growth and improve customer experiences. If you're passionate about working with complex data sets, developing innovative solutions, and collaborating with cross-functional teams, we encourage you to apply.
...
As a Full Stack Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for:
...
- Building models and tools using technical expertise in machine learning, statistical modeling, probability and decision theory, and other quantitative methods. You will innovate by adapting to new modeling techniques and procedures.
...
- Applying analytical rigor and statistical techniques to analyze large datasets, using advanced statistical methods such as predictive statistical models, customer profiling, segmentation analysis, survey design, analysis, and data mining. You will build recommendations and optimization algorithmic designs, perform data retrieval, complexity analysis, and clinical computing.
...
- Programming using a tech stack that includes Python, PySpark
...
, PyTorch, and other relevant
...
- Performing machine learning strategies, and supervised and unsupervised algorithms to build predictive models and prescriptive solutions to support various business use cases.
...
- Building algorithms like decision trees, regression, XGBoost, K means, and anomaly detection. You will also work with interpretable ML, Bayesian theory, and other advanced techniques.
...
**Essential Qualifications
...
- Bachelor's degree and a minimum of four years of experience in data science, machine learning, quantitative or computational fields OR High School/GED and a minimum of seven years of experience in data science, machine learning, quantitative or computational fields.
...
- M.S. in STEM, PC science, statistics systems, physics, mathematics, statistics, data science, machine learning, or similar.
...
- At least four years of experience working with large-scale, complex datasets to create/optimize machine learning, predictive, forecasting, and/or optimization models.
...
- Advanced degree skills in exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and selection, detecting patterns, learning distributions, visualizing results, and extracting insights to help businesses make informed data-driven decisions.
...
- Experience using decision trees, and building classifiers.
...
- Experience with supervised machine learning techniques (linear and logistic regression, time series modeling, generalized linear models, decision trees, support vector machines, etc.) and unsupervised machine learning techniques (K means, hierarchical clustering, association rules, principal components).
...
- Experience with Cloud ML systems, distributed computing, data pipelines, cloud data stores, and serving engines.
...
**Preferred Qualifications:**
...
- Ph.D. in STEM, PC science, statistics systems, physics, mathematics, statistics, data science, machine learning, or similar.
- Experience working with IoT, and Edge AI is a plus.
- Experience in Reinforcement Learning is a plus.
- Experience in Healthcare is a plus.
...
At arenaflex, we value a great attitude and a willingness to learn above all. We offer a dynamic work environment, opportunities for career growth, and a chance to work with a talented team of professionals. If you're passionate about data science, machine learning, and driving business growth, we encourage you to apply.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact

You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
. A Master's degree is strongly preferred and will be given special consideration.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
